p.strong: Technical Specification: Coroutine Runtime Engine v1.2
p.em: Code locations where preemption must be deferred to prevent corruption, deadlock, or UB

g.title: **CRITICAL SECTION: MEMORY ALLOCATION** - Modifies free list pointers (linked list manipulation) - Updates arena metadata (size headers) - May split/coalesce blocks - Internal spinlocks held (global heap lock) - **Invariants:** Heap consistency during pointer swaps

**CRITICAL SECTION: MEMORY DEALLOCATION** - Modifies free list pointers - May coalesce adjacent blocks - Updates allocation bitmap - Internal spinlocks held - **Risk:** Interruption leads to orphaned blocks

**CRITICAL SECTION: BUFFER RESIZING** - May malloc new + memcpy (non-atomic transition) - May shrink in-place - Pointer identity change in progress - **Constraint:** Block must remain pinned during copy
**DEADLOCK RISK: LOCK ACQUISITION** - Atomic CAS on lock word (Transition: 0 -> 1) - May update wait queue (Thread registration) - `FUTEX_WAIT` if contended - Lock state in flux during registration
**DEADLOCK RISK: LOCK RELEASE** - Atomic store/clear (Transition: 1 -> 0) - May wake waiters (Kernel interaction) - `FUTEX_WAKE` syscall execution
**SPINNING: BUSY WAIT LOOP** - Tight CAS loop (Busy wait) - No safe yield point defined within the loop - Preemption defeats purpose of low-latency locking

**REGISTER CORRUPTION** `result = a + b * c / d` - `b * c` computed and stored in volatile register `rax` - Floating point division in progress in `xmm0` - Partial result not yet committed to memory - Resuming after preemption with stale/clobbered registers
**BIT CORRUPTION** `bitmap |= (1 << bit)` - Assembly level: `LOAD` -> `OR` -> `STORE` - Non-atomic sequence without `LOCK` prefix
**UNKNOWN STATE: EXTERNAL CONTEXT** - External library lacks coroutine awareness - May hold internal static locks - TLS (Thread Local Storage) usage unknown
**KERNEL BOUNDARY** - CPU Registers saved for kernel entry - `errno` transition in progress - Signal mask may be temporarily altered
**FFI RE-ENTRANCY** - Stack may be C-allocated (non-segmented) - Cannot yield across foreign frames - Exception handling propagation undefined
**ASYNC CONTEXT: KERNEL INTERRUPTION** - Thread already interrupted by kernel - Reentrant-unsafe by default - Only async-signal-safe ops allowed
**HEAP METADATA CORRUPTED** - Use-after-free - Double-free - Memory leaks
**LOCK HOLDER PREEMPTED** - Other waiters blocked indefinitely - Priority inversion - System hang
**INCOHERENT LOGIC** - Torn reads/writes - Logic errors - Silent data corruption - Race conditions
✅ **SAFE POINT** - Stack frame established - Registers spilled to stack - Caller-saved registers handled
✅ **SAFE POINT** - Iteration complete - Invariants restored - Back-edge check location
✅ **SAFE POINT** - State explicitly saved by programmer - Handshake with scheduler complete

**ASYNC CONTEXT: KERNEL INTERRUPTION** - Thread already interrupted by kernel - Reentrant-unsafe by default - Only async-signal-safe ops allowed
**HEAP METADATA CORRUPTED** - Use-after-free - Double-free - Memory leaks

**INCOHERENT LOGIC** - Torn reads/writes - Logic errors - Silent data corruption - Race conditions
✅ **SAFE POINT** - Stack frame established - Registers spilled to stack - Caller-saved registers handled
✅ **SAFE POINT** - Iteration complete - Invariants restored - Back-edge check location
✅ **SAFE POINT** - State explicitly saved by programmer - Handshake with scheduler complete
